song.title: Revive Thy Work O Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Revive Thy work, O Lord! Now to Thy saints appear! Oh, speak with pow’r to every soul, And let Thy people hear!
[C] Chorus Revive Thy work, O Lord! While here to Thee we bow; Descend, O gracious Lord, descend! Oh, come, and bless us now!
[V2] 2) Revive Thy work, O Lord! And every soul inspire; Oh, kindle in each heart, we pray, The Pentecostal fire!
[V3] 3) Revive Thy work, O Lord! Exalt Thy precious name! And may Thy love in every heart Be kindled to a flame!
[V4] 4) Revive Thy work, O Lord! And bless to all Thy Word! And may its pure and sacred truth In living faith be heard!
[V5] 5) Revive Thy work, O Lord! And make Thy servants bold; Convict of sin and work once more As in the days of old.
[V6] 6) Revive Thy work, O Lord! Give Pentecostal showers! Be Thine the glory, Thine alone! The blessing, Lord, be ours!
song.author: Albert Midlane
